html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Bunnyman

ItemLamp with fireLamp without fire

Rabbit Lamps are decorative Structures which can be obtained at a Bunnyman Shrine for 5 Lucky Gold Nuggets. They can be replenished with Fuel, but cannot be used to cook Food. Charcoal can also fall from them.

DSTDSRoGSWHam

Only during the Event: Year of the Bunnyman
Rabbit Lamp

Short

"A rabbit statue with a real fire in its belly!"
"This lovable light makes any cave cozier."

Tall

"yotr_decor_2"
"yotr_decor_1"
ItemLamp with fireLamp without fire
“I know just the place for it.”
–Wilson
“The more firelight around here, the better!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will find good place for rabbit light.”
–Wolfgang
“I should find a place for it to belong.”
–Wendy
“I WILL FIND A SUITABLE LOCATION FOR IT”
–WX-78
“It would look quite nice right over there.”
–Wickerbottom
“Alright Luce, where should we put it?”
–Woodie
“Someone should set that up.”
–Maxwell
“Let us set the rabbit törch alight!”
–Wigfrid
“It'd be a good night light.”
–Webber
“Now, to find the perfect placement for it.”
–Warly
“Hmmm, where put Hopper?”
–Wormwood
“Gotta find a good place for it.”
–Winona
“I should place this rabbit now that I've nabbed it.”
–Wortox
“Mermfolk light would be better.”
–Wurt
“I'll have it set up in a jiffy!”
–Walter
“I suppose I can spare a moment to set it up.”
–Wanda
“That rabbit can really light up a room.”
–Wilson
“Everything looks better in the firelight.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang likes rabbit night light.”
–Wolfgang
“The soft glow is... comforting.”
–Wendy
“RABBIT-SHAPED LIGHT SOURCE”
–WX-78
“It provides ample reading light.”
–Wickerbottom
“Adds a nice rustic touch, eh?”
–Woodie
“Such unrefined decor.”
–Maxwell
“Let us feast by the rabbit's törchlight!”
–Wigfrid
“It makes us feel safe and cozy.”
–Webber
“Ah, some lovely mood lighting!”
–Warly
“Hopper holding light”
–Wormwood
“A little rustic for my tastes, but functional enough.”
–Winona
“It's my favorite light, but only by a hare.”
–Wortox
“Ugly light statue.”
–Wurt
“It's nice to have a little extra firelight!”
–Walter
“More light is always welcome.”
–Wanda
“That rabbit isn't lighting up anything.”
–Wilson
“Looks like it needs some more fire!”
–Willow
“Rabbit light ran out!”
–Wolfgang
“What little comfort it gave is now gone.”
–Wendy
“LIGHT DEACTIVATED”
–WX-78
“It appears my reading light has run out.”
–Wickerbottom
“Out like a light.”
–Woodie
“Now it's not even useful.”
–Maxwell
“Its light burns nö möre.”
–Wigfrid
“We still like it, even without the light!”
–Webber
“C'est dommage, its little fire has burnt out.”
–Warly
“Night night, Hopper”
–Wormwood
“It ain't much to look at without its light.”
–Winona
“The bunny burns no more.”
–Wortox
“Where light? Bunnyman not doing job!”
–Wurt
“Don't worry, Woby and I will find some kindling for it.”
–Walter
“Oh botheration, the fire went out!”
–Wanda
Rabbit Lamps are decorative Structures which can be obtained at a Bunnyman Shrine for 5 Lucky Gold Nuggets. They can be replenished with Fuel, but cannot be used to cook Food. Charcoal can also fall from them.
